# FreeAppKit – 24 Free Online Web Tools

> FreeAppKit is a free collection of 24 beautiful, production-ready web application templates built with React and Tailwind CSS. No signup required, fully customizable, one-click copy to Hostinger Horizons.

## About
FreeAppKit provides free, open-source web tools for productivity, health, finance, and fun. Every template is mobile-responsive, GDPR-compliant, and ready to deploy. Based in Sankt Augustin, Germany.

## Template Categories (24 Total)

### Productivity (3)
- Gradient Pomodoro Timer – Focus timer with animated gradients and session tracking
- Year Progress Bar – Visualize how much of the year has passed
- Habit Streak Tracker – Track habits with a GitHub-style contribution graph

### Health & Wellness (7)
- Breathing Circle – Calming breathing exercise with pulsing animations
- Emoji Mood Tracker – Track daily mood with emojis and calendar view
- Water Intake Tracker – Stay hydrated with tracking animations
- Sleep Calculator – Calculate optimal bedtimes based on sleep cycles
- Ambient Sound Mixer – Mix relaxing sounds for focus and meditation
- BMI Calculator – Calculate BMI with visual health indicators
- Carbon Footprint Calculator – Calculate CO2 footprint, see how many Earths needed

### Finance (4)
- Tip Calculator – Calculate tips and split bills
- Compound Interest Calculator – Visualize investment growth with charts
- Mortgage Calculator – Loan payments with amortization charts
- Salary Calculator – Net salary with tax breakdowns for Germany and USA

### Fun & Games (5)
- Decision Spinner – Customizable spin-the-wheel tool
- 3D Dice Roller – Realistic 3D dice animations
- Live Age Calculator – Exact age in years, days, hours, live seconds
- Reaction Time Test – Test and improve reaction time
- Music Taste Visualizer – Generate shareable Music DNA cards

### Design & Dev (2)
- Color Palette Generator – Generate palettes, click to copy hex codes
- CSS Gradient Generator – Create CSS gradients with visual editor

### Tools & Utilities (3)
- Daily Inspiration – Quotes with gradient backgrounds
- Event Countdown Timer – Shareable countdowns for events
- Password Generator – Secure passwords with customizable options

## Pages
- [Home](https://freeappkit.com/): Browse all 24 free web app templates
- [About](https://freeappkit.com/about): Mission and what FreeAppKit offers
- [FAQ](https://freeappkit.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about templates and usage
- [How It Works](https://freeappkit.com/how-it-works): 4-step guide to using templates
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://freeappkit.com/affiliate-disclosure): Transparency about monetization
- [Impressum](https://freeappkit.com/impressum): Legal notice (§ 5 DDG)
- [Privacy Policy](https://freeappkit.com/privacy): GDPR-compliant data protection info

## Tech Stack
React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite, React Router
